Visit <a href=\"https://admissions.ucmerced.edu/transfer/requirements\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\">https://admissions.ucmerced.edu/transfer/requirements</a> for more specific UC Merced admissions information.</p><p><br></p><p>Prior to Transferring to UC Merced, please be advised of the following for Junior Transfers:</p><p><br></p><p><strong>1) WRI 001 and WRI 010 are admissions requirements:</strong> WRI 001 is fulfilled by IGETC/Cal-GETC 1A - English Composition. WRI 010 is fulfilled by IGETC/Cal-GETC 1B - Critical Thinking/English Composition. Please scroll towards the bottom of the agreement to find the articulation for each course.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>2) Transfer Admissions Guarantee (TAG):</strong> UC Merced is one of the six UC's that offers Transfer Admissions Guarantee. Please visit the TAG website for more information: <a href=\"https://admissions.ucmerced.edu/transfer/tag\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\">https://admissions.ucmerced.edu/transfer/tag</a></p><p><br></p><p><strong>3) General Education (GE Requirements):</strong> While general education is not required for admission, it can help speed up your time to graduation once you transfer to UC Merced.
